div.div: Choose a category to start designing

div.p:
Choose a garment category
and configure your design

div.style: display:none; position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index:1000; align-items:center; justify-content:center; backdrop-filter:blur(5px);
background:white; padding:30px; border-radius:20px; width:90%; max-width:400px; text-align:center;
div.p:
This is a BETA Version
Enter your email to download your SVG file and get notified about new modules.

input.name: email
input.style: width:100%; padding:12px; border:1.5px solid var(--gray3); border-radius:10px; margin-bottom:15px; font-size:15px; font-family:inherit; outline:none; transition:border .2s;

button.style: background:none; border:none; color:var(--gray2); margin-top:15px; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; font-family:inherit;

div.style: margin-top: 25px; padding-top: 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--gray3); text-align: center;
div.p: Did FlatLabs save you time? Support the development of new modules!

a.style: display: inline-block; padding: 10px 20px; background: #FFD700; color: #1d1d1f; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px;
